hero.badgeDesktop: Autonomous AI agents for distributed SEO
hero.title: Audit your website and generate an <italic>optimized replica</italic> for search engines and AI agents
hero.description: Building the future of positioning with algorithmic precision and ethereal aesthetics.

capabilities.label: 01 / DEEP AUDIT
capabilities.title: 360-degree analysis of your Website
capabilities.description: We analyze every piece of code, metadata, and copywriting to ensure your digital presence is perfectly readable for next-generation algorithms.

items.title: 360 Analysis
items.description: Deep technical audit through autonomous agents that scan every node of your digital architecture.

items.title: Instant Replica
items.description: We create a 'digital twin' optimized specifically for processing by LLMs and modern search engines.

items.title: Edge Infrastructure
items.description: Global synchronization in milliseconds. Your content always available at the network edge for instant loading.

process.label: 02 / INSTANT REPLICA
process.title: A digital twin optimized for AI.
process.description: We don't just audit; we build a parallel data layer. Your website stays human-facing, Mizpa generates an ultra-light version designed to be consumed by search engines and artificial intelligences.

steps.title: Extraction
steps.description: We convert your complex frontend into pure, structured data schemas.

steps.title: Refinery
steps.description: We strip visual noise and unnecessary JS to prioritize knowledge transfer.

steps.title: Sync
steps.description: Your replica updates in milliseconds every time we detect a change on your main site.

quote.text: The future of SEO isn't about being found — it's about being understood.
quote.author: — Mizpa — positioning as the new generation

cta.title: Bring the future to your website today.
cta.desktopDescription: Join the vanguard of digital positioning and redefine how machines perceive your brand.

footer.tagline: Technical SEO architecture for the age of distributed intelligence.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome to Mizpa. Here you can audit and improve your websites.

playground.title: Playground
playground.description: Choose a skill and test your Mizpa agents' capabilities.
playground.tasksHint: Tasks run on remote servers. Results may take a few minutes.
